categories.title: Source Intake & Inventory
categories.summary: The repo needs a clear inventory of raw scans, supplemental scans, source PDFs, and generated artifacts.

categories.title: Scan Cleanup & PDF Construction
categories.summary: The main book should become a clean, consistent, searchable PDF without losing visual source fidelity.

categories.title: OCR, Text, & Provenance
categories.summary: OCR should make the book searchable while preserving an inspectable relationship to scanned page images.

categories.title: Website & Digital Edition
categories.summary: The website should eventually make the book and companion materials readable, searchable, and navigable outside the PDF.

categories.title: Planning Infrastructure
categories.summary: The repo needs enough structure to survive long gaps and handoffs without turning into process theater.

coverage_matrix.notes: Canonical machine-readable inventory of source scans, doc-web bundle, 57 semantic reading sections, generated site, audio scripts, reviewed chapter MP3s, complete audiobook, portable EPUB/M4B editions, PDF artifacts, and generated reunion outreach surfaces.

campaigns.notes: The 153-page main book now has cleaned page images plus distribution and archival searchable PDFs.

The Onward-style static site was built, uploaded to `/home/onward_user/alain-lessard.copper-dog.com`, mapped as a DreamHost hosted subdomain, assigned a Let's Encrypt certificate, and verified publicly over HTTPS at `alain-lessard.copper-dog.com`.
The accepted doc-web bundle `input/doc-web-html/alain-lessard-book-r1/` now drives the public site and audio-script handoff, preserving figures, captions, tables, source scan links, TOC, and search.

The complete known companion set is present under `input/raw scans/Alain's Song/` and `input/raw scans/Growing Up on the Farm/`; generated searchable PDFs and archive/search entries are now part of the normal build surface.

The 52 reviewed MP3s, canonical v4 manifest, generated 9:00:14 complete audiobook, 57-section semantic reader, one Read target per applicable track, and compact listening bars are deployed. All 53 public audio paths passed HTTPS MIME, positive-length, and byte-range verification on 2026-07-16; production playback, resume, single-player, download, and no-JavaScript behavior also passed closeout validation.

The 90.0 MiB EPUB 3 and 257.5 MiB chaptered M4B build from the canonical reading/audio contracts and are deployed with the device-help surface. Local package/app checks and strict production validation pass across 103 HTML pages, 401 references, 59 search rows, all 53 MP3s, and both portable files with exact MIME, length, and byte-range proof.

The large-type letter flyer gives the canonical 1987 cover and unchanged QR the same 4.1-inch height; the 300 ppi preview, phone QR card, standalone QR, builder/tests, provenance checks, stress decodes, and Onward reproduction handoff are generated and digitally validated. On 2026-07-19 the user printed the final equal-height revision, reported that it works perfectly, accepted the artifact, and directed Story 006 closure.

sections.title: Recommended Order
sections.markdown: Stories 001–006 are complete; the reunion flyer and phone QR kit are ready for family use and cross-book replication.

sources.label: Main book raw scans
sources.notes: Alternating top/bottom scanner-platen bands after the cover.

sources.label: Supplemental scans
sources.notes: Complete known supplemental set: 6 scans in `Alain's Song` and 13 scans in `Growing Up on the Farm`. User confirmed there are no more secondary documents.

generated_artifacts.notes: 49 track-aligned narrative sections plus 8 named reference sections derived from all 39 canonical doc-web entries; all 1,737 source block ids are retained exactly once.
Ignored local ElevenLabs Multilingual v2 narration assets paired one-to-one with the 52 tracked Markdown scripts.
9:00:14 complete audiobook generated from the 52 reviewed tracks with 51 two-second pauses.

90.0 MiB DRM-free EPUB built from 57 semantic main-book sections plus 2 companion documents, preserving all 1,737 main-book source block ids and 156 local image references. Repo validation and EPUBCheck 5.3.0 pass with zero messages; Apple Books and epub.js rendering passed on 2026-07-17.

9:00:14, 257.5 MiB M4B generated in one AAC-LC pass from the 52 reviewed tracks with 51 two-second pauses, embedded cover/metadata, and exactly 52 named chapters. Probe, boundary, representative decode/comparison, Apple Books import, chapter navigation, and playback checks pass.

Strict release bundle containing 52 individual tracks plus the complete audiobook, deployed to alain-lessard.copper-dog.com on 2026-07-16; all 53 public paths passed audio/mpeg, positive-length, and 206 byte-range checks.

Deployed to alain-lessard.copper-dog.com on 2026-07-17 with direct no-JavaScript downloads, reading-apps.html guidance, and explicit EPUB/M4B MIME mappings. Strict public validation passed the declared MIME types, exact local lengths, and 206 byte ranges for both files.

Story 006 generated one exact US Letter PDF with the accepted 2550 x 3371 front cover at the same 4.1-inch height as its unchanged QR, a 2550 x 3300 print preview, a 1080 x 1920 phone card, a 1640 x 1640 integer-module QR master, and a build report. Cover path/hash/dimensions/822.2-ppi embedding, embedded/selectable fonts, page/pixel, true-white background with 25.67 percent non-white coverage, black/white quiet-zone, grayscale visual, independent final/reduced/grayscale/blurred/dim QR decode, and public destination/format checks pass on 2026-07-19. The user printed the final equal-height revision, reported that it works perfectly, accepted it, and directed Story 006 closure; individual distance/light/device cells were not separately enumerated.

evals.title: Main book searchable PDF validation
evals.notes: Validate processed-page count, PDF page count, OCR text extraction, and rendered visual samples.
